modelResponses.text:
Here are the audit results for **https://playwright.dev**:

---

### Summary
> Site is usable but needs stronger information hierarchy and accessibility-focused interaction states.

### Findings

| # | Severity | Title | Location | Description | Suggested Fix |
|---|----------|-------|----------|-------------|---------------|
| 1 | **Medium** | Low visual hierarchy on hero section | `/ hero` | Primary heading and supporting text have similar weight and contrast, reducing scannability. | Increase heading size/weight and reduce secondary text prominence for clearer hierarchy. |
| 2 | **Low** | No explicit keyboard focus styling | Global interactive elements | Interactive elements rely on default browser focus outline with inconsistent visibility. | Define a consistent, high-contrast focus ring across interactive components. |

---

Two issues were identified:
1. **Medium – Visual hierarchy**: The hero section's heading and body text don't differentiate enough in size/weight, making it harder to scan quickly. Bumping up the heading prominence would help.
2. **Low – Focus styling**: Keyboard users may struggle to see which element is focused because the site relies on inconsistent default browser outlines. Adding a uniform, high-contrast focus ring would improve accessibility.
